meta.name: Interaction State Matrix
meta.purpose: Figma state variants and implementation expectations.

variants.default: white surface, dark text, subtle border
variants.hover: primary green background, white text, translateY(-1px), md shadow
variants.running: Streamlit st.status panel with explicit tool label
variants.success: assistant message with OK tool expander and evidence paths
variants.error: assistant message with error expander and suggested action

variants.PASS_WITH_RISKS: amber edge and badge; risk remains visible
variants.BLOCK: red edge and badge; next-stage transition forbidden

variants.default: soil panel row with mono value
variants.block: must point to blocking report or tool message

variants.available: rendered only when report/bundle file exists
variants.unavailable: not rendered; do not show fake disabled download

transition_rules: A successful visual state cannot be shown before the corresponding tool returns status=ok.
A stage card active state is orientation, not scientific proof.
When status=error or gate=BLOCK, keep the user in the current stage and show the blocker.
Micro-interactions may clarify affordance but must not imply computation progress.

motion_specs.name: Hero Reveal
motion_specs.purpose: Reveal evidence platform context on first paint without implying computation.

motion_specs.name: Panel Lift
motion_specs.purpose: Show hover affordance for cards and real workflow actions.

motion_specs.name: Button Pressed
motion_specs.purpose: Confirm pointer activation without changing gate status.

motion_specs.name: Focus Ring
motion_specs.purpose: Keep keyboard navigation visible on workflow actions.

motion_specs.name: Loading Sweep
motion_specs.purpose: Allowed only while a real app.py/tools.py action is executing.

motion_specs.name: PASS_WITH_RISKS Pulse
motion_specs.purpose: Keep risk caveats visible without implying full success.

motion_specs.name: BLOCK Shake
motion_specs.purpose: Signal downstream navigation is forbidden after a blocking gate.
